children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 1 Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator appointed by the Director under .section 1531(c) of this title

children.heading: Advisory Commission
children.label: 2 Advisory Commission
children.text: The term “Advisory Commission” means the Advisory Commission established under section 1541 of this title.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Community
children.label: 3 Community
children.text: The term “community” shall have the meaning provided that term by the Administrator, in consultation with the Advisory Commission.

children.heading: Director
children.label: 4 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the Office of National Drug Control Policy.

children.heading: Eligible coalition
children.label: 5 Eligible coalition
children.text: The term “eligible coalition” means a coalition that meets the applicable criteria under .section 1532(a) of this title

children.heading: Grant recipient
children.label: 6 Grant recipient
children.text: The term “grant recipient” means the recipient of a grant award under .section 1532 of this title

children.heading: Nonprofit organization
children.label: 7 Nonprofit organization
children.text: The term “nonprofit organization” means an organization described under that is exempt from taxation under .section 501(c)(3) of title 26section 501(a) of title 26

children.heading: Program
children.label: 8 Program
children.text: The term “Program” means the program established under .section 1531(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the illegal use or misuse of drugs, including substances for which a listing is effect under any of schedules I through V under ;2section 812 of this titleSo in original.2

children.label: B
children.text: the misuse of inhalants or over-the-counter drugs; or

children.label: C
children.text: the use of alcohol, tobacco, or other related product as such use is prohibited by State or local law.

children.heading: Youth
children.label: 10 Youth
children.text: The term “youth” shall have the meaning provided that term by the Administrator, in consultation with the Advisory Commission.
